name: Tool Correctness
description: Evaluates whether the correct tools were called with proper parameters (namespace, filters, query text)

points.label: Perfect
points.description: Correct tool called with all relevant filters extracted and proper namespace selection.

points.label: Good
points.description: Correct tool called but minor filter extraction issues.

points.label: Partial
points.description: Correct tool called but missing important filters or wrong namespace.

points.label: Poor
points.description: Wrong tool called or major parameter errors.

points.label: Failing
points.description: Tool not called when it should have been, or completely wrong parameters.
